mapper.update: update t_user_count set following_total = #{followingTotal} where user_id = #{userId}
update t_content_count set like_total = #{likeTotal} where content_id = #{contentId}
update t_content_count set collect_total = #{collectTotal} where content_id = #{contentId}
update t_user_count set content_total = #{publishTotal} where user_id = #{creatorId}
update t_user_count set fans_total = #{fansTotal} where user_id = #{userId}
update t_user_count set like_total = #{likeTotal} where user_id = #{userId}
update t_user_count set collect_total = #{collectTotal} where user_id = #{userId}
